title: Ginbotham
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Character |type=New Republic |image= |name=Ginbotham |homeworld= |birth= |death= |species=[[Hig]]''[[The New Rebellion]]'' |gender=[[Gender/Legends|Male]] |pronouns=new |height= |mass= |hair= |feathers= |eyes= |skin=Blue |cyber= |families=new |parents=new |partners=new |siblings=new |children=new |affiliation=[[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] |masters= |apprentices= }} {{Quote|I told you not to hit the ships.''"
"''Sorry, sir. Precision shooting is for A-wings.''"
"''Missing a target the size of a moon shouldn't be difficult, Ginbotham.|[[General/Legends|Gen.]] [[Wedge Antilles/Legends|Antilles]] and Ginbotham during the [[Battle of Almania]]|}} '''Ginbotham''' was a male [[Hig]] who served aboard the [[Yavin (starship)|''Yavin'']] in [[17 ABY/Legends|17 ABY]] as part of the command crew, alongside [[Wedge Antilles/Legends|Wedge Antilles]]. ==Biography== Ginbotham was a blue-skinned, slender [[Hig]]. In [[17 ABY/Legends|17 ABY]], he served in the [[New Republic Defense Force/Legends|New Republic Defense Forces]]. He was renowned for his [[Pilot/Legends|piloting]] skills and served as part of the command crew aboard the [[Yavin (starship)|''Yavin'']], a [[Mon Calamari/Legends|Mon Calamari]] [[Mon Calamari Star Cruiser/Legends|Star Cruiser]] under the command of [[General/Legends|General]] [[Wedge Antilles/Legends|Wedge Antilles]]. While serving aboard the ''Yavin'', Ginbotham saw action at the [[Battle of Almania]], where the Republic engaged three [[Victory-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Victory''-class Star Destroyers]] under the command of the terrorist [[Kueller]]. Ginbotham was ordered to fire at one of the Republic's allied ships, the ''[[Wild Karrde]]'', in order to confuse the opponent's [[Droid/Legends|droid]]-operated forces into mistaking the ''Yavin'' for one of their own ships. ==Appearances== *''[[The New Rebellion]]'' {{1st}} ==Sources== *''[[Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' *''[[A Guide to the Star Wars Universe, Third Edition, Revised and Expanded]]'' *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |de=Ginbotham }} [[Category:Hig]] [[Category:Males]] [[Category:New Republic Defense Force personnel]] [[Category:Pilots]]
